Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> > But this allows the code to diverge with what is expected
>  > upstream. I guess people hate this requirement that much.

Not at all :-). I thought it was a good to reduce the "multiline comment warnings".  It comes up a lot when running against full files(very early code) vs on recent changes "git show | checkpatch".... Sorry, I always miss the upstream part, thinking it would live under contrib/scripts under lustre folder.

> 
> I think it is a waste of a line, and needlessly separates the comment from the following line that it applies to.  But, I will remove it.

commit.subject: LU-15671 llite: cleanup code style in xattr.c
commit.message:
LU-15671 llite: cleanup code style in xattr.c

Clean up code style in llite/xattr.c.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
